intro: Glochidion lingulatum, also known as the "Cudran's starbush" or "Glochidion starbush", is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic effects. The bioactive constituents of Glochidion lingulatum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are believed to contribute to its therapeutic properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules.
